OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: J. NBautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff N. R. Patel, is present.
Attorney, Arnold Evje, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Ralph Willis, is present.
Attorney, Aaron Farmer , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem David Yang, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-24-2010 is vacated.
